stemHtml: Rescue and fire fighting – The aerodrome category determining the rescue and fire fighting equipment is based on the...

options.a: overall length of the longest aeroplane normally using the aerodrome and its maximum fuselage width.
options.b: length of the longest runway and maximum fuselage mass of the heaviest aeroplane using that aerodrome.
options.c: overall length of the longest aeroplane using that aerodrome.
options.d: overall length of the longest aeroplane normally using the aerodrome and its maximum fuselage mass.
